name: Fort Morgan Farmers Market

Products.value: Locally-grown produce, flowers, coffee, honey, canned goods, and baked items from regional vendors

notes: The Fort Morgan Farmers Market is hosted by The Block (Commissary Kitchen & Events) at 19592 E 8th Ave, confirming the on-file address and matching the on-file Facebook page (theblockfortmorgan). The on-file website (theblock-mc.com) is legitimate and live; the market has its own page at /the-block-farmers-market which lists vendor applications but no hours/season/products. Hours, months, and products were sourced from Visit Morgan County's official-tourism-board event listing for the 2025 season (select Saturdays, June-September, 9am-1pm), which references the same Block venue and its Facebook page for updates. Could not confirm SNAP acceptance, ADA accessibility, or certified organic status from any source; omitted per instructions. Email and phone are for The Block venue generally (not a market-specific line), but are the best available official contact.
